title: It Will Not Change
content:
It will not change now
After so many years;
Life has not broken it
With parting or tears;
Death will not alter it,
It will live on
In all my songs for you
When I am gone.
meaning:
Sara Teasdale's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "It Will Not Change"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
